latest.natural_language_brief: Today, my recommendation is to hold your positions as we navigate a forecasted downturn in crude oil markets that may impact bitumen pricing stability. Maintain current inventory levels at approximately 200 MT without immediate purchase or sale actions until the next price revision on March 16th (16/3/2026). Keep an eye out for any shifts in expected prices, but remain cautious given our high-risk environment. Aim to reassess market conditions post-revision before making significant moves.
